message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Customer" as Customer
rectangle "BileMo" as BileMo
rectangle "Database" as Database

Customer -> BileMo: DELETE /users/{id}
activate BileMo
BileMo -> Database: DELETE FROM customer_users cu WHERE cu.id = ?
BileMo --> Customer: [204 Response status code]
deactivate BileMo

@enduml
```
